review_title: Not a content editor! It's a Super Charged SEO Content and Website Analyzing Monitor!
description: I have had super positive experiences with everyone at ContentKing. They are amazing and really care about the SEO community at large. They are definitely a company to follow in this space!
author: Joseph K.
pros: I liked that once you set it up, it just runs and keeps you posted on any changes or details that need fixing. It is a hands-free tool that just does what you need it to do: KEEP YOUR SITE RANKING! I like how it allows you to see different views with graphs that you can change with a simple click. You can sort pages that need attention by "order of importance" and "order of severity." This allows me to do what I need to do in the quickest fashion possible. I like the WordPress Plugin as well as the Chrome extension. (these two tools makes sure that I am on point SEO no matter what) - It keeps me posted and accountable to my site for any issues. It keeps track of my content where I don't have to! Yay! It simplifies my life!
cons: The only thing I dislike is the name. The name makes the tool sound like an "editor" like many of the other tools out there. It is not an editor. It is not a content manager, it is a Content SEO auditor/monitor.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: My contentking
description: My experience with contentking has been great. It's collaboration with other tools such as slack, Microsoft team and others has a great impact on my website.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I love it because it works well with external project management workflow. A feature like cloud-base helps me a lot especially in writing, editing and so much more
cons: The negative thing with contentking is that it does not go beyond websites auditing and track. The price per page is also an issue and it makes it hard to choose the right plan

review_title: Complete SEO Analytics Tool
description: My overall experience with using Conductor Searchlight has been productive and satisfactory. Because the investment my marketing team made into the tool generated positive return of investment through incremental lift in non-food products orders, revenue and margin, specifically, from the organic search channel. The tool interface was intuitive with both keyword optimization and analytics features complimenting each other and easy to find. The automated search keyword ranking trends, location of SEO errors and recommendations on how to resolve them, made making content changes more efficient.
author: Gaurav G.
pros: Conductor Searchlight tool enabled me to analyze organic search driven traffic and conversions for specific keywords. So, I could work with my copy writing team to optimize content of landing pages and make them more search friendly. Additionally, I was able to include high volume keywords in title and meta description tags of every landing page. As well as, add internal links based on SEO insights and recommendations provided by Searchlight. If there were pages with broken links or 404 issues, I was able to quickly find those and fix them by implementing 301 redirects.
cons: Conductor Searchlight tool depends on integrating with Google search API and Adobe Analytics. If this integration is not done, Searchlight offers limited SEO insights which can also be pulled through Google Search console. Due to limited SEO technical support provided by Conductor and Adobe, sometimes the additional task of implementing integration becomes a burden on the client development team. So, the value of Searchlight tool can be maximized only if client has robust technical support to do integration.
author_profession: E-commerce Web Analytics & SEO Specialist III

review_title: SEO Safety and change monitoring at a great price
description: Content King has saved us a few times, highlighting issues that would have caused a decline in SEO performance, such as: - We accidently blocked one of our sites from being crawled by search engines via the robots.txt file - An error caused canonical tags to change pointing to redirect URLS - During website migration Title tags changed from what they were previously Without ContentKing, we any have not noticed any of these until we randomly stumbled across them. With ContentKing we get notified within hours.
author: Max P.
pros: The ability to crawl websites in real time and then alert and track the changes is really what sets this tool apart from its competitors. Actually, there are no exact competitors at the time of this review, as all the competition are just website crawlers, but don't actually offer the proactive crawling, alerting and change monitoring that Content King does. Their customer service is second to none and probably the best customer server I have ever received.
cons: Compared to other website crawlers, Content King is somewhat lacking in the number of different things it can check for. However, the real time crawling and alerting is what sets this apart from the others.

review_title: Life saver on migrations & continuously checking all our clients
description: ContentKing has become an integral part of the service we offer clients, we give clients access and almost sell it through to them.
author: Gerry W.
pros: Having used ContentKing for several years now, the value it adds to our clients - being the first to spot when things break, constantly monitoring before / during / after a migration - being able to see changes is incredible. I have recommended this tool now to all my friends because it really is the best. Strength is in simplicity, I put a client in, I get results I don't worry too much about configuration at first - but then I can 'tune' it to capture far more data on the results.
cons: The only thing missing at the moment is JavaScript - I know this is being worked on, every other suggestion I have made has been jumped on but this is a real challenge, my only other complaint is that the export is a Zip CSV which when I just want a dozen URLs is a bit of a challenge, however you can link through to filtered reports.

review_title: Efficient and user-friendly tool for SEO quality
description: Our company manages a portfolio of 42 websites, so having a tool which monitors the SEO quality of multiple domains is essential for us. ContentKing provides a clear overview of issues with context, which makes it easy for less experienced marketeers to fix SEO issues for their own brands. At the same time we can compare the scores across multiple domains, which gives a good overview.
author: Diantha D.
pros: The possibility to create segments for high priority pages with instant alerts when something changes in these segments prevents high-impact mistakes. This is very useful in protecting the SEO quality of money maker pages, but also in noticing platform issues after a release.
cons: ContentKing's reporting features are available, but not very elaborate. More customization could benefit the clarity of the tool.

review_title: Never Let an SEO error fall through the Cracks
description: We like it!
author: Jordan F.
pros: We were using a scanning software where we made a bi-monthly scan of the site to pick up any technical SEO issues that arose. With ContentKing, we now have 24/7 scanning and notifications of issues that arise on the client site.
cons: A few false alerts arrive, but we'd rather sift threw those than be in the dark.

review_title: Intuitive SEO Platform
description: My overall experience with Conductor Searchlight SEO platform has been positive. Because I was able to correlate organic search keyword rankings to the traffic and conversions driven from them. And make optimization changes in copy, title tags and description meta data of landing pages based on the comprehensive SEO insights provided by Searchlight tool. Once Searchlight becomes an office integrated partner of Google Analytics and integration with it becomes easier without having to depend on API work by developers, its usage and adoption will grow tremendously to justify spending additional dollars on it.
author: Craig S.
pros: Conductor SEO platform is easy to use and offers quick organic search insights to improve traffic and conversions from search engine marketing tactic. I could browse its interface to find keyword ranking reports by landing pages as well as competitor reports to compare search results of my apparel e-commerce website without spending too much time. The visual charts and trends made it easy for me to see when my website's search engine rankings started trending down, so I could make copy and meta data changes to improve those rankings. Due to such optimizations, I was able to lift search roi and sales.
cons: Conductor SEO platform is dependent on web analytics software like Adobe or Google Analytics to track organic search engines' driven landing page traffic and product revenue. It doesn't have its own tagging process to track search driven e-commerce website performance. So, additional development and integration effort goes behind enabling connection of Searchlight tool to analytics tools through their API. This extra efforts slows down maximizing the adoption of Searchlight in a marketing team, initially.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Too complex for non-techies
description: Where there's definitely need for what ContentKing does, it can be overwhelming for those that just want to monitor changes to the website(s) they monitor or are responsible for. If you are not tech savvy, you will feel lost, with too much of the information and advice you get being clearly aimed at people with more technical knowledge of websites and coding. Even the support at times just isn't able to explain in simple words what's wrong. Where this might be no issue for developers and more technically skilled SEOs, webmasters, marketers etc., it will not help the less tech savvy people, making ContentKing an expensive solution that is too overwhelming as well as too technically focused.
author: Nathan V.
pros: There's a lot that you can do with ContentKing and it's definitely got a lot of great features. The most useful thing is the monitoring of changes to your web pages. Most of the other features can be found in other tools that audit your website too though. I would personally prefer a cheaper solution (or a stripped subscription) for the monitoring of the page changes only.
cons: It's just too big and complex if you just want to monitor your website(s). The information you get is at times too focused on the more technically skilled developers and SEOs, making it just too much for the regular webmaster, SEO or marketing people. The huge databases and servers needed for this service probably makes it so expensive too. If you can get tools to monitor specific things that you want to monitor, you will not need ContentKing to do it all.

review_title: ContentKing is a great analytical tool that has given us greater insight into our clients' websites.
description: ContentKing has allowed us to keep better track of our clients' websites, discover new opportunities for optimization, pinpoint content management risks and focus our efforts to educate our clients.
author: Koen V.
pros: Our clients rely on us to optimize their websites and boost traffic and conversion. Our work is never finished, which means we need tools that never stop looking. One of the biggest advantages of ContentKing is that it supports us in every step of our process. New clients often think they need a complete rebuild of their website. ContentKing helps us determine whether that is actually necessary and, if so, why it is necessary. And once we've built the new website, it keeps track of a wide range of important on-site metrics that might slip through the cracks otherwise.
cons: ContentKing requires users to specify an allotment of pages for each website they want to track. While this certainly helps keep the total number of tracked pages within the bounds of our plan, it is often difficult to determine exactly how many pages a given website has in advance. It would be helpful if ContentKing gave some insight into this number, allowing us to more accurately adjust the tracking budget.

review_title: Conductor review
description: Personally it my favourite keyword research tool and came with the additional benefit of Deepcrawl (now Lumar)
author: Ryan B.
pros: The most self intuitive tool. Comes with Deepcrawl (now Lumar), the account managers are great and they really take feedback on board. Felt like more of a partnership than a business/client relationship
cons: At the time of use a backlink tool was often rumoured as a future integration but I never saw it come to fruition, maybe it has since....

review_title: A tool I can't live without
description: A vital tool to speed up our work process
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: One of the best things is the real time monitoring of critical elements that can influence the SEO of a website. I really love the support too. They are awesome!
cons: Not sure there is something I don't like. Probably the use of credits. You need to allocate 1000 credits to each website. It doesn't matter if the website has 10 or 999 pages you still have 1000 URLs less :)

review_title: One of the most impressive SEO automation tools I've used
description: It really boils down to the fact that it automates a number of previously-manual, boring processes quite effectively. It greatly reduces the stress of managing a website when you know all of the technicalities are being monitored for issues 24/7.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: + Incredibly easy initial set up + "Set and forget" + Caught a number of site issues I quite honestly never would have diagnosed otherwise + Takes care of some of the most boring parts of my job + Pricing is better than that of other similar products
cons: - Feature set could be built out a bit more - not worried here, as they release new features often and seem to have spot-on priorities. - Mobile app could be cool, not entirely necessary though.

review_title: Proactive tool with actionable insights and real time monitoring.
description: This proactive monitoring tool gives me confidence about a good quality of our websites and saves me a lot of time.
author: Ruben V.
pros: This tool helps to improve the website SEO and finds issues before they become a problem. It monitors real time our complete website for changes that have a potential to hurt it SEO wise. Some of the errors Contentking found also affected the visitors of our website, so it also helped to give an improved visitor experience. Another pro is the great support team. So, a must have tool!
cons: Honestly, no complaints. The support team cleared up any issues and listed new feature requests.

review_title: Great product for Automated Client Monitoring
description: Clients make changes to their websites and don't understand the SEO and Commercial implications of their changes so having automated monitoring to flag changes to us charged with maximising their performance is key
author: Lee W.
pros: A genuinely useful product for automated monitoring of client websites.
cons: There are false positive alerts but these can be easily excluded. For example Shopify uses Lets Encrypt SSL Certificates which renew every 60 or 90 days. So each time the renewal is due ContentKing alerts that the cert has nearly expired. This is easily disabled in the admin

review_title: SEO & Marketing Analysis with Conductor
description: I am using Conductor over months to drive my marketing strategy, to undersntad SEO audit and increase SEO score with it.
author: Mert D.
pros: Conductor is easy tool to use for SEO management, you can improve your SEO score with Conductor to reach more people with Search. It is helpful for using small businesses and large scale to drive marketing strategy.
cons: Conductor has nice features but they should improve dashboard to better understanding. There should be Google Data Studio connector to use with Google tools.

review_title: Great website quality management tool
author: Sonja H.
pros: Very good overview of the projects and active notification when acute errors occur. So I can focus on my main work and feel perfectly supported. Easy to learn how to use it.
cons: Some parameters are not possible to manage yourself, which are not correct from an SEO point of view. This results in many alerts that are somewhat stressful. The name is a bit confusing - because from my point of view it is more of a technical support than one from a content point of view.

review_title: A Tremendous Tool & Then Some
description: Overall, ContentKing is an indispensable tool for any SEO. The user interface is super clean and very easy to navigate, the tracking is very accurate and super reliable and I'm able to rest easy, knowing that I'll always have a reliable record of changes made to a page in the event that I need to restore previous versions. A tremendous tool and then some, thank you ContentKing!
author: Shane B.
pros: Add a website to ContentKing and any changes made to that website that might affect it's SEO will be automatically tracked so that you can safely experiment with various elements and revert back to prior versions if required. No more manually tracking changes by hand in a spreadsheet, each time even the slightest change is made, ContentKing will pick it up and add it to a growing list of every change made to that page.
cons: Although ContentKing is easily integrated with Google Analytics & Search Console, and does provide basic stats for each page, there's not way to track how updates to a Title or Meta-Description might have impacted Click Through Rate from one change to the next. That would be a great addition to this terrific tool.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Great SEO suite if you are willing to pay a high price
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Actually, they deliver everything you can imagine getting your content marketing to the next level. I also liked their newly content experience suite, that definitely gives you valuable insights for your content creation and can make your contact creation process more efficient.
cons: I tested the suite in-depth with a free trial. At the end of the day I decided against searchmetrics, as especially when you want to take advantage of all the different suites / products they offer, they are IMO the most expensive software on the market.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: The end all in house tool for SEO
description: It changes the way SEO is done in house. It helps us integrate SEO into all of our marketing initiatives.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I really liked the full funnel marketing approach conductor takes to SEO. It helps classify every keyword in the early, middle to late funnel in the buying process. I also really like the ability to make wireframes for my writing team all within the platform.
cons: It's just so darn expensive... Organic traffic really has to be a huge revenue driver for you business in order for the investment to make sense.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Best User-Friendly Real-Time Auditing Tool on the Market!
author: Charles T.
pros: I think it's ability to detect technical issues promptly which can save you hours of time, trying to diagnose SEO problems. I also love the interface, it's a lot more user-friendly than a lot of the other SEO auditing tools on the market.
cons: Pricing model - we love the software but would prefer it to be a monthly subscription so we have a clear indication of how much we can budget for this tool. Paying per website isn't the most feasible especially as we scale up and take on more and more clients.

review_title: It's been amazing. ContentKing is a tool that I was looking for a long time.
description: Alerts and daily seo audits
author: Will T.
pros: I like the alerts that I receive when something got wrong and the daily audit that it does in my website
cons: The price is too high and I can't use to all of my clients. I chose a few to test it and try to sell to the others
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great SEO tool for monitoring websites and SEO auditing
author: Robin V.
pros: Really happy with ContentKing. It's helping us monitor several websites and flagged important website changes that otherwise probably would've been discovered after days or even weeks. It's really easy to set up and use. It has a lot of cool features, a sweet user interface, and excellent customer service. And it keeps getting updated with cool new features.
cons: Standard segments could be a nice addition.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Slick looks and great performance
description: The tool saves me a lot of time.
author: PieterJan V.
pros: ContentKing collects the right points for attention, presents them beautifully and thus assures our customers of a better SEO result.
cons: More information about a problem would save me a search. For example, the message: "Not all required Open Graph elements present". A short list of those elements or a link to the info would save me time.
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Compliments Google Analytics nicely
author: Dimitar P.
pros: After the initial set up ,ContentKing is great at automating tedious tasks and also following up the progress on a lot of separate projects .I'm especially pleased with how quickly updates are incorporated .
cons: It is a pricey solution ,but worth it . Also , you have to be very careful not to miss a webpage when adding them manually
